notes: Checkpoint state evidence now uses bounded retriever reads, preserves actual decoded timestamps and OCR status, and reserves MediaCodec for localized refinement.

## What's new

- Fixed the Android 15 `InvalidForegroundServiceTypeException` crash by using typed WorkManager foreground execution.
- Restored visible 3-minute, 1-minute, and 5-minute checkpoint scan options.
- Kept Fast change-map (500 ms) as the default scan option.
- Preserved the existing ROI, change-map, checkpoint, clip, decoder, and export pipeline behavior.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/hughbechainez-byte/CompilationMaker/compare/v0.17.2...v0.17.3
